name: Shortbread Treats
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pk Shortbread cookies; broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cookie pieces in a large bowl.
2. Place chocolate chips in a medium microwave-safe bowl.
3. Microwave on medium-high power for 3 minutes, stirring after each minute until the chips melt.
4. Stir in chopped pecans.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cookie pieces; stir until the pieces are well coated.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto baking sheets lined with waxed paper.
7. Chill until the chocolate hardens.
8. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
Yield: about 8 dozen cookies.
